CustomField.formula: null /* CASE( TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c), 'Assembly MR', leaseworks__Utilization_Report_List_Item__r.leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__r.leaseworks__Total_Maintenance_Reserve__c, 'Aircraft MR', leaseworks__Utilization_Report__r.leaseworks__Total_Maintenance_Reserve__c , null) */
CustomField.label: Total Reserve
